title: Area Manager (Retail)
description:
About The Company

We have partnered with one of the leading retail groups in Singapore with a strong presence across multiple store formats islandwide. With a portfolio of well-established brands, the business continues to grow and adapt, serving diverse customer segments though its network of over 50 outlets.

Job Summary

The successful candidate will oversee the operations, performance, and compliance of multiple retail stores within a designated region. This role ensures that each store consistently meets company standards for safety, customer service, profitability, and operational efficiency. Acting as the key link between store managers, staff, and senior management, the Area Manager drives both strategic and day-to-day success.

Key Responsibilities

  • Drive sales growth and achieve profitability targets across all stores.
  • Manage budgets, shrinkage, cost control, and expense approvals.
  • Analyse financial reports, identify trends, and implement corrective measures.
  • Conduct performance reviews and establish clear KPIs for the team.
  • Supervise daily operations across assigned stores.
  • Ensure compliance with company policies, health, safety, and environmental regulations.
  • Monitor stock levels, manage supplier relationships, and coordinate logistics.
  • Foster a positive work environment that promotes accountability, teamwork, and customer focus.
  • Maintain high standards of service, presentation, and cleanliness across all stores.
  • Handle escalated customer complaints and resolve issues promptly.
  • Implement initiatives to enhance customer satisfaction and loyalty.
  • Conduct regular audits and inspections to ensure operational excellence.

Qualifications

  • Diploma in Business, Retail Management or related field.
  • At least 7 years of experience in retail management.
  • Proven good leadership, communication, and people management skills.
  • Excellent analytical, problem solving, and decision making abilities.
  • Ability to work flexible hours, including evenings, weekends, and public holidays.

postedCompany.description:
At Elevon Consulting, we specialise in connecting proven talents with forward-thinking organisations across diverse industries.

Our mid to senior management recruitment practice focuses on identifying individuals with the strategic acumen, leadership capability, and commercial foresight to drive business growth. Whether you're hiring for department heads, functional leaders, or executive roles, we deliver candidates who combine hands-on experience with the vision to shape long-term success.

Through a consultative approach, market insight, and a strong professional network, we ensure every placement aligns with your culture, goals, and operational needs — empowering businesses to build capable, future-ready leadership teams.
postedCompany.name: ELEVON CONSULTING PTE. LTD.
